feed.title: SAP Community - ABAP Testing and Analysis
feed.subtitle: ABAP Testing and Analysis Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Configuring the Remote ATC Central Check System in a S/4HANA consolidation/test system
entry.content:
Hello

I have a question for configuring Central ATC check system for our SAP S/4HANA 2023 systems.

First a bit of background for our requirement:

We have a dual S/4hana landscape one for Production Support(BAU changes) and one for Project Development work.
Our current dual S/4HANA landscape consist of the following:
BAU Dev(PSD) -> BAU Quality(PSQ) -> Pre-Prod(PRE) -> Production(PRD)
&
Project Dev(DEV) -> Project Quality(QAS) -> Pre-Prod(PRE) -> Production(PRD)

We have configured ChaRM with retrofit in our Solution Manager system 7.2 SP14.

We are looking into using enhanced retrofit s/4hana check for retrofitting changes from source system BAU Dev(PSD) on SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS00(lower release) into target system Project Dev(DEV) on SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS01(higher release) as per the SAP Note 2504773 

https://me.sap.com/notes/2504773

Once of the prerequisite for retrofitting changes between systems on different release or support package level is to have a Central ATC system(ATC hub) configured and connect the Solution manager system to the ATC hub, see below sap help link for more information.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_Solution_Manager/8b923a2175be4939816f0981b73856c7/afb05ae119a0408dada0200502a8d419.html?locale=en-US&version=7.2.14

So my question is whether can we use our existing Project Quality(QAS) system and configure it as an Central ATC system(ATC HUB) and connect both the development systems to ATC hub Project Quality(QAS) system and connect Solman to ATC hub and use the cross release checks for s/4hana for retrofitting?

We do not have a sandbox system in our landscape, so can we use our existing quality system as Central ATC system for this purpose?

@OlgaDolinskajaand @DoloresCorreayour views would be appreciated here. 

Thanks & Regards,

Sharyu

entry.title: Issue with Setting Up GOS (Generic Object Services) in Custom Transaction
entry.content:
Hi,

I am facing issue while generating Service Object Services in my custom transaction.

I tried this code which i got from google :

    CREATE OBJECT lo_gos_manager
      EXPORTING
        is_object    = VALUE borident( objtype = 'BUS001'    " Business Object type for Plant
                                       objkey  = gv_plant )  
        ip_mode      = 'S'                                   
        ip_no_commit = 'R'                                   " Prevent commit conflicts
      EXCEPTIONS
        OTHERS = 1.

    IF sy-subrc <> 0.
      MESSAGE 'Error initializing GOS Manager' TYPE 'E'.
    ENDIF.

*    " Start GOS with a standard service like attachment
    CALL METHOD lo_gos_manager->start_service_direct
      EXPORTING
        ip_service = 'SGS_SRVNAM'  " Use a valid GOS service name
        is_object  = VALUE borident( objtype = 'BUS001' objkey = gv_plant )
        ip_no_check = abap_true           " Skip availability check for smoother execution
      EXCEPTIONS
        OTHERS = 1.

    IF sy-subrc <> 0.
      MESSAGE 'Error starting GOS Service' TYPE 'E'.
    ENDIF.

But i am getting an error that "Error starting GOS Service".

I am very new to this type scenario

My implementation project is replica of MM01 t-code

Could you please help me on this?

entry.title: Is there a way to put an editor lock to ATC Check variant in ATC -> Manage Variants?
entry.content: Is there a way to put a lock to ATC Check variant in ATC -> Manage Variants so that no one tampers the variant configuration?

entry.title: Local ATC Checks fail with incorrect message "Execution of check seemingly aborted"
entry.content:
Hello,

When running ATC checks with any variant, the result is a failure with warning message "Execution of check seemingly aborted" - which is incorrect.
We are running the ATC Check locally on our S/4 Development System (no rfc involved). We have already implemented SAP Notes 3232321 and 3163848.
All guides I've found so far seem to be for remote checks from a central ATC System, which does not apply to us, so I'd be happy about any tips.

entry.title: converting SCMON data to an aggregated data manually
entry.content:
Hello SAP team,

 

We are starting a S/4 Hana conversion project. I enabled SCMON in production system on October in 2024 and downloaded SCMON data each week since system deletes data older than a week. I didn't know we need to aggregate data in order to add aggregated data in Custom Code Migration app in SAP Fiori App. 

 

Is it possible to upload SCMON data from the excel file to aggregated data tables? If yes can you please direct us for doing it?

 

Thanks and kind regards


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Is there a way to detect whether a BAPI is for read or write through metadata?
entry.content:
Hi all,

Is there any bapi attribute or any other details in the BAPI metadata that can be used to determine if the BAPI is for read or write?

BAPI_USER_GETLIST - reads list of all users - so a read bapi

BAPI_PO_CREATE1 - creates a purchase order - so a write bapi

BAPI_USER_LOCK - changes state of a user to locked - a write bapi

Note: NWRFCSDK is being used for fetching BAPI metadata and other details

Thanks.

entry.title: Restricting Duplicate Notifications for Same Equipment
entry.content:
If a notification is created, first check whether a previous notification exists for the same equipment. If an open notification already exists, restrict the creation of a new one notification.

To implement this logic, I have tried using a user exit with the procedure mentioned below. Can you suggest whether this logic will work smoothly?"

User Exit and Logic for Restriction

In the QQMA0002 & QQMA0026   user exit you will use the VIQMEL table to query existing notifications and restrict new ones based on equipment.

User Exit: (QQMA0002 & QQMA0026):

Steps to Implement the Restriction Logic:

  1. Query the VIQMEL table
    • Use VIQMEL-EQUNR (Equipment Number) to find existing notifications.
    • Filter by QMART (Notification Type) is necessary.
    • Retrieve OBJNR (Object Number) from the result.
  2. Check Status in JEST Table
    • Use OBJNR to fetch the status from JEST table.
    • Filter with INACT field:
      • If INACT is blank (Active) → Restrict notification creation.
      • If INACT is 'X' (Inactive) → Allow creation.
  3. Prevent Notification Creation
    • If restriction applies, use MESSAGE statement to show an error message.

                                                     ⬇️ 

             Already have created same equipment Notification

 

Logic Description (Step-by-Step):

  1. Find Existing 'M2' Notifications: Retrieve all notifications from the VIQMEL table where EQUNR matches the equipment number and QMART is 'M2'.
  2. Check Status (JEST): For each notification found in step 1, retrieve the corresponding status from the JEST table using the OBJNR.
  3. Determine Activity: For each JEST entry:
    • If INACT is blank (space), the notification is considered active.
    • If INACT is 'X', the notification is considered inactive.
  4. Apply Restriction:
    • If at least one active 'M2' notification is found in step 3, prevent the creation of the new 'M2' notification and display an error message.
    • If all existing 'M2' notifications are inactive (INACT = 'X') or no 'M2' notifications exist (step 1 returned no results), allow the creation of the new 'M2' notification.

PLM Enterprise Asset Management (EAM)/Plant Maintenance (PM) SAP Asset Performance Management MM (Materials Management)

entry.title: When I move to Quality system from Dev my BW Query OData service, it is moved "proforma".
entry.content:
Hello to all of you. The problem is as follows:

I develop OData service with all the artifacts based on Query. The tests are ok, and when I move to Quality system I see that in the service persists in /iwfnd/maint_service but the REG_SERVICE and REG_MODEL tables doesnt have the corresponding records. The service and its belonging model are missing.
For example the Model (XXXX_MDL) is available in table /IWBEP/I_MGW_OHT in the development system, but when moved it is missing in quality. When I execute the service in /iwfnd/gw_client, I got status code Error 500 - No service found for namespace /SAP/.....

entry.title: Put a New ZTable on SM30
entry.content:
Hi, im trying to put a new Ztable on SM30.
I already create a Table Maintenance Genator, on Utilities and generate maintence view on SE11, but when i try to acess the table on SM30, this shows up:

Dont´t show anything and the table is allready filled with some data.
And when I try to put new entries, the error message shows up: This table dont have relevants fields.
I try to create a transaction on SE93 too, to acess, but reppend the same as i mencioned.

What should i do?

entry.title: When uploading bank statement in FF_5, the items got cleared on account incorrectly.
entry.content:
When bank statement is uploaded through FF_5, the items at subledger level are getting cleared incorrectly. The subledger posting is done for 135000 amount where it should not have done against it as the correct amount from the xml file was 134975. In spite of the 25 dollars difference, it is clearing against 135000. 

I have debugged and check the code, but not able to make progress with the issue. Any help is appreciated. Thanks!

entry.title: ATC for S4 conversion run readiness check
entry.content:
Hi - similar to the ATC can we also run SCI from remote system to SAP ECC development box.

my satellite system is on basis 7.52 where as my SAP ECC dev box is at lower version hence  dont S4 2022 readiness check variant ? - any suggestion / help 

 

thanks

entry.title: Is it possible to use F4 help event of CL_GUI_ALV_GRID for CL_SALV_TABLE related program
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have created a program where I want to create custom F4 help depending on the line selected. Please find the code below requesting you to please let me know if there is any solution. I have tried to change the field catalog for two fields to make them editable, but that's not working. Please suggest a correction for this, too.

@Sandra_Rossi 

@naimesh_patel 

@Former Member 

@RaymondGiuseppi 

 

 

*&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
*& Report ZPPMAT_QRPRINBT
*&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
*&
*&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
REPORT ZPPMAT_QRPRINBT.
TABLES : MSEG,MKPF,MARA,MAKT.
SELECTION-SCREEN : BEGIN OF BLOCK B1 WITH FRAME TITLE TEXT-H01.
  SELECT-OPTIONS: S_MBLNR FOR MSEG-MBLNR.
SELECTION-SCREEN : END OF BLOCK B1.

CLASS LCL_EVENT_HANDLER DEFINITION.
  PUBLIC SECTION.


    METHODS:
      ON_LINK_CLICK
        FOR EVENT
        LINK_CLICK OF CL_SALV_EVENTS_TABLE
        IMPORTING ROW COLUMN.
    METHODS ON_ADDED_FUNCTION
      FOR EVENT IF_SALV_EVENTS_FUNCTIONS~ADDED_FUNCTION OF CL_SALV_EVENTS_TABLE
      IMPORTING E_SALV_FUNCTION..


ENDCLASS.                    "lcl_event_handler DEFINITION

CLASS LCL_REPORT DEFINITION.
  PUBLIC SECTION .
*   ALV reference
    INTERFACES IF_ALV_RM_GRID_FRIEND .
    DATA: LO_FUNCTIONS TYPE REF TO CL_SALV_FUNCTIONS_LIST.
    DATA: LO_SELECTIONS TYPE REF TO CL_SALV_SELECTIONS.
    DATA: LO_SALV TYPE REF TO CL_SALV_TABLE.
    TYPES: BEGIN OF TY_MKPF,
             MBLNR TYPE MBLNR,
             MJAHR TYPE MJAHR,
             BLDAT TYPE BLDAT,
             BUDAT TYPE BUDAT,
             XBLNR TYPE XBLNR,
           END OF TY_MKPF.

    TYPES: BEGIN OF TY_MSEG,
             MBLNR      TYPE MBLNR,
             MJAHR      TYPE MJAHR,
             WERKS      TYPE MSEG-WERKS,
             MATNR      TYPE MATNR,
             CHARG      TYPE CHARG_D,
             LIFNR      TYPE LIFNR,
             MENGE      TYPE MENGE_D,
             MEINS      TYPE MEINS,
             EBELN      TYPE EBELN,
             ABLAD      TYPE ABLAD,
             VFDAT      TYPE VFDAT,
             HSDAT      TYPE HSDAT,
             BUDAT_MKPF TYPE BUDAT,
           END OF TY_MSEG.

    TYPES:BEGIN OF TY_FINAL,
            CHECK       TYPE YQRSTR-ZCHECK,
            MBLNR       TYPE YQRSTR-MBLNR,
            MJAHR       TYPE MSEG-MJAHR,
            WERKS       TYPE MSEG-WERKS,
            MATNR       TYPE YQRSTR-MATNR,
            MAKTX       TYPE YQRSTR-MAKTX,
            MENGE       TYPE YQRSTR-MENGE,
            MEINS       TYPE YQRSTR-MEINS,
            SKUN        TYPE YQRSTR-SKUN,
            QUAN        TYPE CHAR10,
            CREATED_BY  TYPE NAME1,
            VERIFIED_BY TYPE NAME1,
            BOX_UNIT    TYPE STRING,
          END OF TY_FINAL.

    DATA :IT_FINAL TYPE TABLE OF TY_FINAL,
          WA_FINAL TYPE  TY_FINAL.
    DATA: IT_MSEG    TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF TY_MSEG,
          LO_COLUMNS TYPE REF TO CL_SALV_COLUMNS,
          LO_COLUMN  TYPE REF TO CL_SALV_COLUMN_TABLE,
          LO_EVENT   TYPE REF TO CL_SALV_EVENTS_TABLE.


    TYPES : BEGIN OF TY_MARA,
              MATNR TYPE MARA-MATNR,
              FERTH TYPE MARA-FERTH,
            END OF TY_MARA.
    TYPES : BEGIN OF TY_MAKT,
              MATNR TYPE MAKT-MATNR,
              MAKTX TYPE MAKT-MAKTX,
              SPRAS TYPE MAKT-SPRAS,
            END OF TY_MAKT.

    DATA: IT_MKPF  TYPE TABLE OF  TY_MKPF,
          WA_MKPF  TYPE  TY_MKPF,
          IT_MSEG1 TYPE TABLE OF  TY_MSEG,
          WA_MSEG1 TYPE  TY_MSEG.
    DATA: IT_MARA TYPE TABLE OF TY_MARA,
          IT_MAKT TYPE TABLE OF TY_MAKT.

    DATA:
      LS_KEY    TYPE SALV_S_LAYOUT_KEY,
      LO_LAYOUT TYPE REF TO CL_SALV_LAYOUT.
    METHODS:
      HANDLE_ON_F4
        FOR EVENT ONF4 OF CL_GUI_ALV_GRID
        IMPORTING E_FIELDNAME
                  ES_ROW_NO
                  ER_EVENT_DATA.
    METHODS:
      DOUBLE_CLICK FOR EVENT DOUBLE_CLICK OF CL_GUI_ALV_GRID IMPORTING E_ROW
                                                                       E_COLUMN
                                                                       ES_ROW_NO.
    METHODS: EVH_AFTER_REFRESH FOR EVENT AFTER_REFRESH OF CL_GUI_ALV_GRID IMPORTING SENDER.
    METHODS : GET_DATA_AND_FILL_DATA,
      DISPLAY.
  PRIVATE SECTION.
    DATA: HANDLER_ADDED TYPE ABAP_BOOL.
ENDCLASS.

CLASS LCL_REPORT IMPLEMENTATION.
  METHOD GET_DATA_AND_FILL_DATA .
    SELECT  MBLNR MJAHR BLDAT BUDAT XBLNR FROM MKPF
          INTO TABLE IT_MKPF
          WHERE MBLNR IN S_MBLNR.

    IF IT_MKPF[] IS NOT INITIAL.
      SELECT MBLNR
             MJAHR
             WERKS
             MATNR
             CHARG
             LIFNR
             MENGE
             MEINS
             EBELN
             ABLAD
             VFDAT
             HSDAT
             BUDAT_MKPF
        FROM MSEG
        INTO TABLE IT_MSEG
        FOR ALL ENTRIES IN IT_MKPF
        WHERE MBLNR = IT_MKPF-MBLNR AND
              BWART = '101'.
    ENDIF.
    IF IT_MSEG IS NOT INITIAL.
      SELECT MATNR
             FERTH  FROM MARA INTO TABLE IT_MARA
             FOR ALL ENTRIES IN IT_MSEG WHERE MATNR = IT_MSEG-MATNR ." SKU Value

      SELECT MATNR
             MAKTX
             SPRAS FROM MAKT INTO TABLE IT_MAKT
        FOR ALL ENTRIES IN IT_MSEG WHERE MATNR = IT_MSEG-MATNR
                                     AND SPRAS = SY-LANGU .

    ENDIF.


    LOOP AT IT_MSEG INTO DATA(WA_MSEG).
      WA_FINAL-MBLNR = WA_MSEG-MBLNR.
      WA_FINAL-MJAHR = WA_MSEG-MJAHR.
      WA_FINAL-WERKS = WA_MSEG-WERKS.
      READ TABLE IT_MARA INTO DATA(WA_MARA) WITH KEY MATNR = WA_MSEG-MATNR.
      IF SY-SUBRC = 0 .
        WA_FINAL-MATNR = WA_MSEG-MATNR.
        READ TABLE IT_makt INTO DATA(WA_MAKT) WITH KEY MATNR = WA_MSEG-MATNR .
        IF  SY-SUBRC = 0 .
          WA_FINAL-MAKTX = WA_MAKT-MAKTX.
        ENDIF.
        WA_FINAL-MENGE = WA_MSEG-MENGE.
        WA_FINAL-MEINS = WA_MSEG-MEINS.
        READ TABLE IT_MARA INTO WA_MARA WITH KEY MATNR = WA_FINAL-MATNR .
        IF SY-SUBRC = 0 .
          WA_FINAL-SKUN = WA_MARA-FERTH.
          IF WA_FINAL-SKUN IS NOT INITIAL .
            WA_FINAL-QUAN = WA_FINAL-MENGE / WA_FINAL-SKUN.
          ENDIF.
        ENDIF.
      ENDIF.
      APPEND WA_FINAL TO IT_FINAL.
    ENDLOOP.

  ENDMETHOD .
  METHOD DISPLAY.
    TRY.
        CALL METHOD CL_SALV_TABLE=>FACTORY
          IMPORTING
            R_SALV_TABLE = LO_SALV
          CHANGING
            T_TABLE      = IT_FINAL[].

        IF lO_SALV IS BOUND .
          CALL METHOD LO_SALV->SET_SCREEN_STATUS
            EXPORTING
              REPORT        = SY-REPID
              PFSTATUS      = 'ZSTANDARD' "your PF Status name
              SET_FUNCTIONS = LO_SALV->C_FUNCTIONS_ALL.


          LS_KEY-REPORT = SY-REPID.
          LO_LAYOUT = LO_SALV->GET_LAYOUT( ).
          LO_LAYOUT->SET_SAVE_RESTRICTION( IF_SALV_C_LAYOUT=>RESTRICT_NONE ).
          LO_LAYOUT->SET_KEY( LS_KEY ).
          LO_LAYOUT->SET_DEFAULT( ABAP_TRUE ).

          LO_COLUMNS = LO_SALV->GET_COLUMNS( ).
          LO_COLUMNS->SET_OPTIMIZE( 'X' ).
          TRY.
              LO_COLUMN ?= LO_COLUMNS->GET_COLUMN( 'CHECK' ).
              LO_COLUMN->SET_VISIBLE( IF_SALV_C_BOOL_SAP=>TRUE ).
              LO_COLUMN->SET_LONG_TEXT( 'Check' ).
              LO_COLUMN->SET_CELL_TYPE( IF_SALV_C_CELL_TYPE=>CHECKBOX_HOTSPOT ).
            CATCH CX_SALV_NOT_FOUND.
            CATCH CX_SALV_EXISTING.
            CATCH CX_SALV_DATA_ERROR.
          ENDTRY.
          TRY.
              LO_COLUMN ?= LO_COLUMNS->GET_COLUMN( 'QUAN' ).
              LO_COLUMN->SET_VISIBLE( IF_SALV_C_BOOL_SAP=>TRUE ).
              LO_COLUMN->SET_LONG_TEXT( 'Bag Quantity' ).
            CATCH CX_SALV_NOT_FOUND.
            CATCH CX_SALV_EXISTING.
            CATCH CX_SALV_DATA_ERROR.
          ENDTRY.
          TRY.
              LO_COLUMN ?= LO_COLUMNS->GET_COLUMN( 'CREATED_BY' ).
              LO_COLUMN->SET_VISIBLE( IF_SALV_C_BOOL_SAP=>TRUE ).
              LO_COLUMN->SET_LONG_TEXT( 'Inspected By' ).
              LO_COLUMN->SET_OPTIMIZED(
                VALUE = IF_SALV_C_BOOL_SAP=>TRUE
              ).
            CATCH CX_SALV_NOT_FOUND.
            CATCH CX_SALV_EXISTING.
            CATCH CX_SALV_DATA_ERROR.
          ENDTRY.
          TRY.
              LO_COLUMN ?= LO_COLUMNS->GET_COLUMN( 'VERIFIED_BY' ). " Find the 'MAKTX' column ans change attributes
              LO_COLUMN->SET_VISIBLE( IF_SALV_C_BOOL_SAP=>TRUE ).
              LO_COLUMN->SET_LONG_TEXT( 'Verified By' ).
              LO_COLUMN->SET_OPTIMIZED(
                VALUE = IF_SALV_C_BOOL_SAP=>TRUE
              ).
            CATCH CX_SALV_NOT_FOUND.
            CATCH CX_SALV_EXISTING.
            CATCH CX_SALV_DATA_ERROR.
          ENDTRY.
          TRY.
              LO_COLUMN ?= LO_COLUMNS->GET_COLUMN( 'BOX_UNIT' ). " Find the 'MAKTX' column ans change attributes
              LO_COLUMN->SET_VISIBLE( IF_SALV_C_BOOL_SAP=>TRUE ).
              LO_COLUMN->SET_LONG_TEXT( 'Box Unit' ).
              LO_COLUMN->SET_F4(
                VALUE = IF_SALV_C_BOOL_SAP=>TRUE
              ).
              LO_COLUMN->SET_OPTIMIZED(
                VALUE = IF_SALV_C_BOOL_SAP=>TRUE
              ).
            CATCH CX_SALV_NOT_FOUND.
            CATCH CX_SALV_EXISTING.
            CATCH CX_SALV_DATA_ERROR.
          ENDTRY.
          DATA LO_SETTINGS TYPE REF TO CL_SALV_DISPLAY_SETTINGS.
          LO_SETTINGS = LO_SALV->GET_DISPLAY_SETTINGS( ).
          LO_SETTINGS->SET_STRIPED_PATTERN( IF_SALV_C_BOOL_SAP=>TRUE ).

          DATA: LO_EVENTS TYPE REF TO CL_SALV_EVENTS_TABLE,
                G_GRID    TYPE REF TO CL_GUI_ALV_GRID.
          LO_EVENTS = LO_SALV->GET_EVENT( ).

          DATA: LO_EVENT_HANDLER TYPE REF TO LCL_EVENT_HANDLER.
          CREATE OBJECT LO_EVENT_HANDLER.

          SET HANDLER HANDLE_ON_F4 FOR ALL INSTANCES.
          SET HANDLER DOUBLE_CLICK FOR ALL INSTANCES.
          DATA(SELECTIONS) = LO_SALV->GET_SELECTIONS( ).
          SELECTIONS->SET_SELECTION_MODE(   IF_SALV_C_SELECTION_MODE=>CELL  ). "Single row selection
          SET HANDLER LO_EVENT_HANDLER->ON_LINK_CLICK FOR LO_EVENTS.
          SET HANDLER LO_EVENT_HANDLER->ON_ADDED_FUNCTION FOR LO_EVENTS.

*          DATA :MO_EDIT  TYPE REF TO IF_SALV_GUI_OM_EDIT_RESTRICTED.
*          MO_EDIT = LO_SALV->EXTENDED_GRID_API( )->EDITABLE_RESTRICTED( ).
*
*          TRY.
*              MO_EDIT->SET_ATTRIBUTES_FOR_COLUMNNAME(
*                EXPORTING
*                  COLUMNNAME              = 'VERIFIED_BY'
*                  ALL_CELLS_INPUT_ENABLED = ABAP_TRUE
*              ).
*            CATCH CX_SALV_NOT_FOUND. " ALV: General Error Class (Checked in Syntax Check)
*          ENDTRY.
*          TRY.
*              MO_EDIT->SET_ATTRIBUTES_FOR_COLUMNNAME(
*                EXPORTING
*                  COLUMNNAME              = 'CREATED_BY'
*                  ALL_CELLS_INPUT_ENABLED = ABAP_TRUE
*              ).
*            CATCH CX_SALV_NOT_FOUND. " ALV: General Error Class (Checked in Syntax Check)
*          ENDTRY.
          LO_SALV->DISPLAY( ).
        ENDIF .
      CATCH CX_ROOT .

    ENDTRY.

  ENDMETHOD.

  METHOD HANDLE_ON_F4.
    BREAK-POINT.
  ENDMETHOD.
  METHOD DOUBLE_CLICK.
    BREAK-POINT.
  ENDMETHOD.
  METHOD EVH_AFTER_REFRESH.
    CHECK HANDLER_ADDED EQ ABAP_FALSE.
*    SET HANDLER ME->EVH_DEL_CHANGE_SELECTION FOR SENDER.

*    "to use this method you need to inherit from cl_gui_alv_grid or add interface IF_ALV_RM_GRID_FRIEND
*    "to your class
    SENDER->SET_DELAY_CHANGE_SELECTION(
      EXPORTING
        TIME   = 100    " Time in Milliseconds
      EXCEPTIONS
        ERROR  = 1
        OTHERS = 2
    ).
    IF SY-SUBRC <> 0.
*     message id sy-msgid type sy-msgty number sy-msgno
*                with sy-msgv1 sy-msgv2 sy-msgv3 sy-msgv4.
    ENDIF.

    SENDER->REGISTER_DELAYED_EVENT(
      EXPORTING
        I_EVENT_ID = SENDER->MC_EVT_DELAYED_CHANGE_SELECT
      EXCEPTIONS
        ERROR      = 1
        OTHERS     = 2
    ).
    IF SY-SUBRC <> 0.
    ENDIF.

    SENDER->GET_FRONTEND_FIELDCATALOG(
      IMPORTING
        ET_FIELDCATALOG = DATA(FCAT)    " Field Catalog
    ).

    "setting editable fields
    ASSIGN FCAT[ FIELDNAME = 'VERIFIED_BY' ] TO FIELD-SYMBOL(<FCAT>).
    IF SY-SUBRC EQ 0.
      <FCAT>-EDIT = ABAP_TRUE.
    ENDIF.

    ASSIGN FCAT[ FIELDNAME = 'CREATED_BY' ] TO <FCAT>.
    IF SY-SUBRC EQ 0.
      <FCAT>-EDIT = ABAP_TRUE.
    ENDIF.

    SENDER->SET_FRONTEND_FIELDCATALOG( IT_FIELDCATALOG = FCAT ).
    SENDER->REGISTER_EDIT_EVENT(
      EXPORTING
        I_EVENT_ID = SENDER->MC_EVT_MODIFIED    " Event ID
*      exceptions
*       error      = 1
*       others     = 2
    ).
    IF SY-SUBRC <> 0.
*     message id sy-msgid type sy-msgty number sy-msgno
*                with sy-msgv1 sy-msgv2 sy-msgv3 sy-msgv4.
    ENDIF.

    SENDER->SET_READY_FOR_INPUT(
      I_READY_FOR_INPUT = 1
    ).

    HANDLER_ADDED = ABAP_TRUE.
    SENDER->REFRESH_TABLE_DISPLAY(
*      exporting
*        is_stable      =     " With Stable Rows/Columns
*        i_soft_refresh =     " Without Sort, Filter, etc.
*      exceptions
*        finished       = 1
*        others         = 2
    ).
    IF SY-SUBRC <> 0.
*     message id sy-msgid type sy-msgty number sy-msgno
*                with sy-msgv1 sy-msgv2 sy-msgv3 sy-msgv4.
    ENDIF.


  ENDMETHOD.


ENDCLASS.

START-OF-SELECTION.
  DATA: LO_REPORT TYPE REF TO LCL_REPORT.
  CREATE OBJECT LO_REPORT.
  LO_REPORT->GET_DATA_AND_FILL_DATA( ).
  LO_REPORT->DISPLAY( ).

CLASS LCL_EVENT_HANDLER IMPLEMENTATION.

  METHOD ON_LINK_CLICK.
    DATA :MO_EDIT  TYPE REF TO IF_SALV_GUI_OM_EDIT_RESTRICTED.
    FIELD-SYMBOLS: <LFA_DATA> LIKE LINE OF LO_REPORT->IT_FINAl.
    READ TABLE LO_REPORT->IT_FINAL ASSIGNING <LFA_DATA> INDEX ROW.
    CHECK SY-SUBRC IS INITIAL.
    IF <LFA_DATA>-CHECK IS INITIAL.
      <LFA_DATA>-CHECK = 'X'.
    ELSE.
      CLEAR <LFA_DATA>-CHECK.
    ENDIF.
    LO_REPORT->LO_SALV->REFRESH( ).
  ENDMETHOD.                    "on_link_click
  METHOD ON_ADDED_FUNCTION.
    DATA: IT_BAPIRET2 TYPE TABLE OF BAPIRET2,
          WA_BAPIRET2 TYPE BAPIRET2.

    DATA: LO_GRID TYPE REF TO CL_GUI_ALV_GRID.
    IF LO_GRID IS INITIAL.
      CALL FUNCTION 'GET_GLOBALS_FROM_SLVC_FULLSCR'
        IMPORTING
          E_GRID = LO_GRID.
    ENDIF.

    CALL METHOD LO_GRID->CHECK_CHANGED_DATA.

    LOOP AT LO_REPORT->IT_FINAL  INTO DATA(WA_FINAL) WHERE CHECK = 'X'.
      IF WA_FINAL-CREATED_BY IS  INITIAL .
        WA_BAPIRET2-TYPE ='E'.
        WA_BAPIRET2-MESSAGE = |Please Maintain Created By For Material Doc { WA_FINAL-MBLNR }|.
        APPEND WA_BAPIRET2 TO IT_BAPIRET2 .
        CONTINUE.
      ENDIF .
      IF WA_FINAL-VERIFIED_BY IS  INITIAL .
        WA_BAPIRET2-TYPE ='E'.
        WA_BAPIRET2-MESSAGE = |Please Maintain Verified By For Material Doc { WA_FINAL-MBLNR }|.
        APPEND WA_BAPIRET2 TO IT_BAPIRET2 .
        CONTINUE.
      ENDIF .
    ENDLOOP.
    "perform something.

  ENDMETHOD.
ENDCLASS.

entry.title: LSMW for OBCB
entry.content:
Hi,

I am creating LSMW for transaction OBCB with Batch input option.

In the first pop-up( BDC recording (SAPLSVIX 0100 ) , I give the partner type, Partner number and company code. press enter.

In the next screen,( BDC recording (SAPL0F11 0061 ) I click on new entries,  Goods service number,  text, Gl a/c and company code.  and press save.  

click on up arrow button. 

I am expecting this process to repeat in the LSMW; but the BDC is failing as it is expecting entries in screen 61 and not going back to selection screen. 

Anyone tried this before, can let me know what to do ? Thanks

entry.title: SUSG integration with ATC
entry.content:
Hello All - there are soo many tcodes/ tool within SAP for performing analysis of Sap ECC custom code to S4 Hana conversion , which one is most preferred one ?

custom code  -  Analyze the custom code to S4 using ATC - ? or other SAP Readiness check2.0  /SDF/? 

usage of custom code - SUSG , SCMON , UPL - ? other ?

are there any sap ecc related fiori app to merge information of custom code along with usage ? - like CCMC / CCLM in solution manager ?

 

thanks

entry.title: 2 steps-Workaround for unavailable Excel export function in ALV report
entry.content:
Hello, as I realized that it may be helpful for colleagues SAP Consultants/Users, I'm also sharing here a workaround in ALV report when export button is not showing.

N.B : This requires the print button to be displayed at least, as well as an output device (printer) to be active in system.

  1. once your ALV report is displayed, click on the print button and select LP01 as output device (try alternative printers if LP01 is not available)

2. Go to transaction SP01 and retrieve the related spool-> click on the little blue square next to it

That's it! Local file export button is now displayed with spreadsheet export type option 🎉
 

Credits to my great snipping tool : Greenshot

entry.title: Question: Is ABAP performance tracing (ST12) still a topic?
entry.content:
Hi,
 
more than 10 years ago i wrote a couple of blogs on ABAP
performance tracing with ST12 (see below). 

The performance tools in ADT and the tools for SAP GUI
in  the SAP standard (STATS, SAT, ST05 and SCI) are
always available and particularly good in their specific areas.
But for me,  ST12 was (and in 2025 still is) like a
Swiss army knife when it comes to ABAP performance tracing.
I like to use it as a first tool and revert to the other tools when
necessary.

In the last 10+ years i haven't been active on here since
i worked on other topics. Now I'm back and work on ABAP (and
CDS and HANA) topics again. I looked a little bit around here and
still remember some names that i have seen more than 10 years ago.

I wonder if ABAP performance tracing is sill a topic or are
ABAP performance problems = solved problems? Would
you be interested in an update on ST12 or is this an outdated
topic and not relevant to you anymore?

Kind regards,

Hermann
 
 
Single Transaction Analysis (ST12) – getting start... - SAP Community
ST12 - The workprocess trace - SAP Community
ST12 - storing additional information and managing... - SAP Community
ST12 – tracing user requests (Tasks & HTTP) - SAP Community
ST12 - tracing a single dialog step - SAP Community
ST12 - tracing function modules - SAP Community
ST12 – Who calls whom (get the call stack with bot... - SAP Community
ST12 - new features - SAP Community
ST12 - 01N_* SP1 new features - SAP Community
ST12 - Schedule Traces - SAP Community

entry.title: How to use bseg and for all entries in
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Since BSEG is a cluster table, it does not support JOIN, ORDER BY, or GROUP BY operations.

How should the code be written in this case?

 

I used a query as below,

   SELECT
B~BUKRS  C~SAKNR B~AUGDT B~AUGBL B~ZUONR B~GJAHR B~BELNR
B~BUZEI  B~BUDAT B~BLDAT A~CPUDT B~WAERS B~XBLNR B~BLART
B~BSCHL  "ZUMSK
 B~SHKZG  B~GSBER B~MWSKZ B~DMBTR B~WRBTR
B~SGTXT  B~HKONT
C~REBZG  C~REBZJ C~REBZZ B~XRAGL B~XREF1 B~XREF2
B~XNEGP  B~XREF3 B~BUPLA B~BUZID B~AUGGJ
APPENDING CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE GT_BSIS
FROM bkpf as A JOIN BSIS AS B ON
    A~BUKRS = B~BUKRS
    AND A~GJAHR = B~GJAHR
    AND A~BELNR = B~BELNR JOIN BSEG AS C ON
    B~GJAHR = C~GJAHR
    AND B~BELNR = C~BELNR
    AND B~BUZEI = C~BUZEI
      FOR ALL ENTRIES IN GT_BSISD2_E
WHERE A~BUKRS = P_BUKRS
      AND C~REBZJ EQ GT_BSISD2_E-REBZJ
      AND C~REBZG EQ GT_BSISD2_E-REBZG
      AND C~REBZZ EQ GT_BSISD2_E-REBZZ
      AND B~GSBER EQ GT_BSISD2_E-GSBER
AND ( C~REBZG NE SPACE
            AND C~REBZG NE 'V' ).

entry.title: S4 - Migration - Fiori App
entry.content:
Hello All - 

for planning the migration of custom code from ECC to S4 , ( Fiori Migration app need to be always run on S4 as backend system? 

or if we have run the readiness check in the ECC using ATC (ABAP TEST COCKPIT) , can the zip file be uploaded directly ? 

 

thanks 

aakash

entry.title: how to analyze ATC result for the S4 variant for the conversion
entry.content:
Hello All - 

We have Ran the ATC on SAPBasis central system 7.2 and over ECC environment against the variant - SAP S4 Hana readiness 2023. 

the file was uploaded to the SAP readiness check report ... is there a way we can get automatic s4 simplification fix that can performed thru ADT ( eclipse) ? can we do the same with the SAP GUI in S4..

 

thansks

aakash

entry.title: Vendor import
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

I am facing the following issue while trying to create a vendor number using a reference vendor number via custom program (BP Transaction).

I used the method by passing data through the structure ls_data. Inside ls_data, I have included the vendor address data. However, I am still encountering the same error messages.

It seems like the data may not be correctly passed into the deep structure. Could you please advise on how to properly pass data in a deep structure for this scenario?

Any guidance or examples would be greatly appreciated.
